title: campium fluviatile
intro: Campium fluviatile, also known as Water Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant that belongs to the balsam family. It is native to Europe and Asia and is commonly found in wetlands and along rivers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as respiratory problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Campium fluviatile can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
